name: fx
description: Terminal JSON viewer and processor. Interactive navigation with fuzzy search, JavaScript expressions for transforming data, and streaming support.

name: dasel
description: Query, modify, and convert data in JSON, YAML, TOML, XML, CSV, and INI with a single tool. Zero runtime dependencies.

name: xsv
description: Fast CSV command-line toolkit written in Rust. Indexing, slicing, searching, joining, and statistics on large CSV files.

name: q
description: Run SQL directly on CSV, TSV, and other delimited files. Auto-detects column types and supports JOINs, GROUP BY, and caching.

name: VisiData
description: Terminal spreadsheet multitool for exploring tabular data. Handles CSV, JSON, SQLite, Excel, and many formats with vim-like keybindings.

name: diff-so-fancy
description: Makes git diffs human-readable. Removes +/- clutter, simplifies headers, and highlights word-level changes for faster code review.

name: delta
description: Syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, grep, and blame output. Side-by-side view, line numbers, and bat-compatible themes.

name: mkcert
description: Zero-config tool to create locally-trusted development certificates. Installs a local CA in the system trust store automatically.
